text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)

Minor point: This bugzilla was not submitted against the system:

Product:	Ports & Packages
Component:	Individual Port(s) (show other bugs)

but the change that fixes things was in the systems, not the
port (nor upstream).

This explains my original reference to "Overcome By Events".
